events.title: Sweating It Out at General Watkins
events.thought: The fan ran full blast all night to keep the habitat module in survivable range. It kind of worked.
events.photoCaption: A ThermoWorks digital thermometer mounted inside the habitat module reads 90.7°F interior temperature at 67% relative humidity.
photoNote: Day 27 Report: In the morning, found beautiful winding mountain roads through Daniel Boone. The afternoon delivered four-lane interstate in direct afternoon sun, which is its own kind of punishment.
The Navigator's southern routing strategy is showing signs of failure. 95°F at 6 PM. Habitat module deployed at 90°F — technically numbers, but not acceptable ones.
A cold front is sitting about 100 miles north. Tomorrow, I will do what I can to steer us toward it.
